changes.summary: Removed required attribute that selected how guide content was generated (Manual, Prompt, or Document).
Removed optional prompt used when source was Prompt.
Removed optional URL used when source was Prompt.
Removed computed guide status (Draft or ProductionReady).
Removed computed latest saved version identifier.
Removed computed latest production-ready version identifier.
Create always uses a Manual source; source, prompt, and url are no longer read from configuration.
Create no longer runs prompt-based content generation or automatically creates an initial guide version; manage versions with genesyscloud_guide_version separately.
Removed optional attribute that controlled draft vs publish workflow (Draft, ProductionReady, or TestReady).
After create, the provider always attempts to publish the version to ProductionReady; draft-only creation via state is no longer supported.
When the parent guide already has a production-ready version, update creates a new version instead of patching the existing one; otherwise it updates the latest saved version.
After update, the provider always attempts to publish the version to ProductionReady.
Export includes only each guide's latest saved version, no longer exporting a separate production-ready version when it differs.
Export resolves resources.data_action.data_action_id references to genesyscloud_integration_action resources.
Export omits generate_content from generated configuration.
